article.headline: Dortmund cruise past Cologne 4-0 with Malen double
article.description: Donyell Malen scored twice as Borussia Dortmund eased past hosts Cologne 4-0 on Saturday to make it two Bundesliga wins in a row this year.
article.linkText: Malen double sees Dortmund beat Cologne 4-0

images.name: Donyell Malen scores goal for Borussia Dortmund
images.caption: Donyell Malen scores goal for Borussia Dortmund

video.headline: Donyell Malen scores goal for Borussia Dortmund
video.caption: Donyell Malen scores goal for Borussia Dortmund
video.title: Donyell Malen scores goal for Borussia Dortmund
video.description: Donyell Malen scores goal for Borussia Dortmund

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Donyell Malen scores goal for Borussia Dortmund) 2024/01/20 ESHEET

article.story:
Donyell Malen scored twice as Borussia Dortmund eased past hosts Cologne 4-0 on Saturday to make it two Bundesliga wins in a row this year.

The visitors were stronger from the start and Dutch international Malen put them in front in the 12th minute after drilling in from Julian Brandt's corner.

- Stream on ESPN+: LaLiga, Bundesliga, more (U.S.)

The game had to be interrupted for about eight minutes a little later after fans threw chocolate coins onto the pitch in protest to the planned sale of a stake in the Bundesliga media rights firm to an investor.

While Dortmund gradually took their foot off the gas, Cologne almost levelled right after the restart with Jan Thielmann's point-blank effort palmed wide by keeper Gregor Kobel.

Cologne's Linton Maina then hit the woodwork with a superb effort in the 50th before Dortmund struck against the run of play when Jadon Sancho was brought down in the box.

Niclas Füllkrug stepped up and converted the spot kick in the 58th to double their lead and only three minutes later Malen bagged his second goal after he latched on to a sensational Ian Maatsen pass to slot in.

Substitute Youssoufa Moukoko tapped in a fourth in stoppage time.

Dortmund are in fifth place on 33 points, as many as fourth-placed RB Leipzig, who take on league leaders Bayer Leverkusen later on Saturday.

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Donyell Malen scores goal for Borussia Dortmund) 2024/01/20 ESHEET

keyEvents.text: First Half begins.

Goal!  1. FC Köln 0, Borussia Dortmund 1. Donyell Malen (Borussia Dortmund) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Julian Brandt with a cross   following a corner.
Salih Özcan (Borussia Dortmund) is shown the yellow card.
First Half ends, 1. FC Köln 0, Borussia Dortmund 1.
Substitution, Borussia Dortmund. Hendry Blank replaces Niklas Süle.
Goal!  1. FC Köln 0, Borussia Dortmund 2. Niclas Füllkrug (Borussia Dortmund) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom right corner.

Goal!  1. FC Köln 0, Borussia Dortmund 3. Donyell Malen (Borussia Dortmund) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Ian Maatsen with a through ball   following a fast break.
Substitution, 1. FC Köln. Faride Alidou replaces Dejan Ljubicic.
Substitution, 1. FC Köln. Justin Diehl replaces Linton Maina.
Substitution, Borussia Dortmund. Marco Reus replaces Julian Brandt.
Substitution, Borussia Dortmund. Jamie Bynoe-Gittens replaces Jadon Sancho.
Substitution, 1. FC Köln. Jacob Christensen replaces Florian Kainz.
Substitution, Borussia Dortmund. Youssoufa Moukoko replaces Niclas Füllkrug.
Substitution, Borussia Dortmund. Giovanni Reyna replaces Salih Özcan.
Jeff Chabot (1. FC Köln) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Ian Maatsen (Borussia Dortmund) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Jan Thielmann (1. FC Köln) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, 1. FC Köln. Benno Schmitz replaces Rasmus Carstensen.
Substitution, 1. FC Köln. Sargis Adamyan replaces Jan Thielmann.
Goal!  1. FC Köln 0, Borussia Dortmund 4. Youssoufa Moukoko (Borussia Dortmund) right footed shot from very close range to the top right corner. Assisted by Jamie Bynoe-Gittens.
Second Half ends, 1. FC Köln 0, Borussia Dortmund 4.
